overview: Brilliant Institute of Engineering and Technology (BRIL), established in 2008, is a prominent private autonomous institution in Hyderabad. It is a key constituent of the Brilliant Group of Technical Institutions (BGTI) and is situated on a sprawling 70-acre campus. The institute is dedicated to delivering industry-ready technical education across engineering, management, and polytechnic streams.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. Approved by AICTE and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH). Polytechnic programs are recognized by SBTET.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, Cyber Security, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + TS EAMCET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: 70% of seats (Category A) are filled through TGCHE convener counseling. 30% of seats (Category B) are management quota seats filled based on merit/JEE scores. Admission for 2026-27 involves an online application via the official website followed by document verification.
admissions.importantDates: TS EAMCET 2026: May 9-11, 2026; TS ICET 2026: May 2026; Application Deadline: Typically June/July 2026.

campus.specialNote: The campus is an 'Integrated Technical Campus' known for its massive scale and diverse inter-college collaborations. It houses an Entrepreneurship Development Cell and over 10 Research & Development MOUs to foster a startup ecosystem among students.

contact.address: Abdullapurmet (V), Near Ramoji Film City, Hayathnagar (M), Ranga Reddy District, Hyderabad, Telangana - 501505
